'''Moldisin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Reigat]] who served as a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent and a member of the [[Sandwind Team (Sriluur)|Sandwind Team]] on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Rather than serve as the group's muscle, Moldisin worked as the Sandwind Team's [[Technician/Legends|tech]] and medic.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]'' {{1stm}}
